_note: Label Sprint round for ovule — generated ovule_illus.webp, cropped/keyed dark mode.
caption: Tap each label, then tap where it belongs on the ovule.

hotspots.label: Funiculus
hotspots.detail: The stalk that attaches the ovule to the placenta.

hotspots.label: Integument
hotspots.detail: The protective outer layer(s) that will develop into the seed coat.

hotspots.label: Micropyle
hotspots.detail: A small opening at the tip, formed by the integuments, through which the pollen tube enters.

hotspots.label: Nucellus
hotspots.detail: The tissue mass enclosed by the integuments, surrounding the embryo sac.

hotspots.label: Embryo sac
hotspots.detail: The megagametophyte containing the egg cell, where fertilisation occurs.
